name: Cracked Glacier
description: A vast river of ancient ice spills down between the peaks, its surface split by yawning blue crevasses. The glacier creaks and shifts underfoot, and meltwater trickles unseen far below. A frozen ridge rises to the north, and a dark fissure in the ice mouth opens to the east.
ambient_messages: Deep beneath the ice, the glacier shifts with a groan you feel in your teeth.
A crevasse yawns wider with a sharp crack, and cold air breathes up from the dark.
Frozen wind scours the glacier, raising a stinging veil of ice crystals.
